cases.title: Add multiple rewards to program
cases.evidence: Both reward types selectable from dropdown. Fixed points (5.00) and % of order value (10.00) added. Both persist after page navigate and reopen: 4 reward rows confirmed in reloaded blade.

cases.title: Toggle program active/inactive
cases.evidence: Active toggle clicked OFF → Save → navigate away → reopen: toggle shown OFF (dark/grey, knob left). Toggle clicked ON → Save → navigate away → reopen: toggle shown ON (blue/checkmark, knob left). No data loss (4 rewards, Priority=1, Name preserved both cycles).

cases.title: Set start and end date for program
cases.evidence: Start date set to Jun 10, 2026 12:00:00 AM and End date set to Jul 9, 2026 12:00:00 AM via text input. After Save → navigate away → reopen: both dates confirmed in textbox fields (Jun 10, 2026 12:00:00 AM / Jul 9, 2026 12:00:00 AM).

cases.title: Priority value persists after save
cases.evidence: Test Loyalty Program: Priority=1 confirmed on reopen. Produict points 2: Priority changed from 0 to 2, saved, navigate away, reopen: Priority=2 confirmed. Both distinct priority values persisted independently.

cases.title: Add localized names for program
cases.evidence: es-ES field filled with 'Programa de Lealtad', pl-PL field filled with 'Program Lojalnosciowy'. After Save → navigate away → reopen: both localized names confirmed in respective textboxes.

cases.title: Language options available in localized names
cases.evidence: Clicked 'Show more languages' link — expanded to show all 10 required locales: en-US, de-DE, fr-FR, es-ES, pl-PL, it-IT, pt-PT, ja-JP, zh-CN, ru-RU. All present, no duplicates. Link changed to 'Show less languages' confirming expansion.

cases.title: Validation: empty program name
cases.evidence: Clicked Add → selected 'Order loyalty' type → New loyalty program blade opened with empty Name field. Name field shows pink/salmon background (required-field validation highlight). Save button (floppy disk icon) is greyed out/disabled — save cannot proceed. Conditions and rewards sections also show pink error boxes ('must have at least one condition/reward'). Grid count badge remains '4' — no new program created. Validation working as designed (disabled Save = validation enforced, PASS per real-user rule).

cases.title: Validation: negative reward value
cases.failedAssertion: Validation error displayed OR field prevents negative value; reward NOT saved
cases.notes: Entered -5 in the first reward value field ('fixed points') on Test Loyalty Program. Field accepted the input with no client-side validation error (no red highlight). Save button became active. Clicked Save — no error toast, no validation message. After navigate-away and reopen, first reward shows '-5.00 fixed points', confirming the negative value was persisted to the backend. Expected: validation error displayed OR field prevents negative, NOT saved. Actual: negative value accepted, saved, and persisted. Test data restored to 0.00 after test.

bugs.title: Loyalty reward accepts and persists negative point value without validation error
bugs.failedAssertion: Validation error displayed OR field prevents negative value; reward NOT saved
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Navigate to /#!/workspace/loyalty. 2. Open an existing loyalty program (e.g. 'Test Loyalty Program'). 3. In 'Get the following loyalty rewards' section, click a fixed-points reward value field. 4. Clear the field and type '-5'. 5. Press Tab to commit. 6. Click Save. 7. Navigate away and reopen the program.
bugs.expected: Either: (a) field rejects the negative input immediately with a validation error, OR (b) Save is blocked with a validation message, OR (c) server rejects and returns an error. The negative value should NOT be persisted.
bugs.actual: Field accepts '-5' with no client-side validation. Save button becomes active. Save succeeds with no error toast. On reopen, reward shows '-5.00 fixed points' — negative value fully persisted to backend.
